title: dactylorhiza × daunia
intro: Dactylorhiza × daunia, also known as the Daunia's Spotted Orchid hybrid, is a rare and unique orchid species resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza maculata and Dactylorhiza fuchsii. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × daunia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
